incident_details.short_description: General Unexpected Error when creating an Opportunity
incident_details.description: User reports that whenever they try to save a new Opportunity record, they receive a popup stating 'An unexpected error has occurred. Please contact your system administrator.'

technical_context.trace_log_snippet: System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of an object at Company.CRM.Plugins.OpportunityCreate.Execute

resolution.root_cause: The plugin was attempting to access the 'Parent Account' field, but the user had left the field blank, causing a null reference exception in the C# code.
resolution_steps: 1. Reproduced the issue in the Sandbox environment using the user's security role.
2. Identified the missing null-check in the 'OpportunityCreate' plugin code.
3. Added a guard clause to check if the Account lookup is null before processing.
4. Deployed the updated assembly via Plugin Registration Tool.
5. Verified the fix by creating an Opportunity without an account.
